recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Surpasses Oscar-Winner to Become Highest Grossing Biopic - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: Michael Jackson was not only the King of Pop, he's also proving to be the King of the box-office. Almost two decades after his death, Jackson's biopic, "Michael" is creating history at the box-office while being set to touch the coveted $1 billion mark. As per the latest reports, "Michael" has also created history by becoming the highest grossing biopic of all time, dethroning Christopher Nolan's Oscar-winning 2023 mega-project "Oppenheimer.". The King of Pop's real-life nephew, Jaafar Jackson, portrays the role of Michael Jackson for the biopic. Despite the envious box-office numbers, the film opened to a moderate critics rating, as the Tomatometer rates the film at 38%. Despite the difference in the certifications of the two movies with "Michael" getting a PG-13, and Cillian Murphy-starrer "Oppenheimer" an R, the relevance of the "Thriller" hitmaker's biopic cannot be ignored. However, notwithstanding the criticism, the film is still doing well at the box-office, and on its way to grossing $1 billion.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了麥可傑克森的傳記電影《Michael》在票房上表現強勁，超越《奧本海默》成為史上最高票房傳記片，但內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jasmine Yen declares bold new era of self-confidence with latest single ‘Roll With Me’ - The Standard (HK)
recentArticles.snippet: # Jasmine Yen declares bold new era of self-confidence with latest single ‘Roll With Me’. Rising singer-songwriter Jasmine Yen has marked her return to the music scene with the release of her latest single, “Roll With Me,” a bold and empowering anthem that signals a fresh, independent chapter in her burgeoning career. Yen uses a playful vocal delivery and distinct charisma to champion individuality and unfiltered self-expression, dedicating the project to a new era defined by complete creative freedom. Following the release, she took to social media to express gratitude to her creative team and her family, whom she credited as her ultimate source of support. A natural talent who began songwriting at just seven years old, the introverted artist turned to music as her primary emotional outlet, a passion that eventually earned her a scholarship to the prestigious Berklee College of Music. “Roll With Me” serves as the opening chapter of her new artistic journey, leaving fans highly expectant for her upcoming body of work.

recentArticles.title: Beyoncé Joins Jay-Z as He Celebrates 'Reasonable Doubt' 30th Anniversary in New York City - Just Jared
recentArticles.snippet: # Beyoncé Joins Jay-Z as He Celebrates ‘Reasonable Doubt’ 30th Anniversary in New York City. **Beyoncé** is making a rare appearance to support husband **Jay-Z**! The 44-year-old “Alien Superstar” singer and the 56-year-old “Young Forever” rapper left his Roc Nation office building on Thursday night (June 25) in New York City. Earlier that day, **Jay** and the couple’s 14-year-old daughter **Blue Ivy Carter** stopped by his ***Reasonable Doubt Jay-Z30*** pop-up event to celebrated the 30th anniversary of his landmark debut album *Reasonable Doubt*, which he dropped back on June 25, 1996. In celebration of of the 30th anniversary of his debut album, along with the 25th anniversary of his *The Blueprint* album, **Jay** will be playing a trio of shows at Yankee Stadium in July, plus a finale concert called “Extra Innings.” He’ll then be heading to Paris and then Los Angeles for more anniversary shows! ***Browse through the gallery below for more photos of Beyoncé and Jay-Z in NYC…***.

recentArticles.snippet: # Apple will launch 15+ new products this fall, here’s what’s coming. Apple has a packed lineup of product launches coming this fall, including new iPhones, Macs, iPads, and more. Apple’s flagship iPhone 18 lineup will go ultra-premium this fall, dropping the base model iPhone 18 that’s rumored to arrive in early 2027 instead. ## Apple Watch Ultra 4 and Apple Watch Series 12. Apple is rumored to launch two new Apple Watch models this year: Apple Watch Ultra 4 and Apple Watch Series 12. ## MacBook Ultra, new M6 MacBook Pro, and M5 Mac Studio, more. It’s a big year for the Mac, with MacBook Neo and new MacBook Pro and MacBook Air models recently launched. A new iPad Air arrived earlier this year, but two more iPads are expected to launch before 2026 ends: an iPad mini with OLED and a new base-model iPad.

recentArticles.title: Watch Charli XCX Let Loose in Video for New Song “Wink Wink” - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: # Watch Charli XCX Let Loose in Video for New Song “Wink Wink”. It’s the pop star’s third preview of *Music, Fashion, Film*. With an hour’s notice and a bat of her eyelashes, Charli XCX ushered in her third single from *Music, Fashion, Film*, “Wink Wink.” The song gets a music video directed by frequent collaborator Aidan Zamiri, in which the pop star swears she’s “not a bad girl anymore.” Check it out below. “Wink Wink” arrives after the headline-baiting single “Rock Music” and the more traditionally pop-indebted “SS26.” Charli has denied that *Music, Fashion, Film* is a rock album, but it does seem like she got plenty of inspiration beyond the dance floor—or at least in terms of who she rang up to pose for its cover. Charli has a short arena tour planned to celebrate her upcoming release as well as a number of headlining sets at music festivals, including Lollapalooza and Outside Lands. Revisit the track review of Charli XCX’s “Rock Music.”.

recentArticles.title: How Jay-Z Changed Rap With ‘Reasonable Doubt’ - Defector
recentArticles.snippet: # How Jay-Z Changed Rap With ‘Reasonable Doubt’. If you went back in time to New York in the early '90s, not a soul would believe you if you told them Jay-Z would end up where he is today. Jay-Z's relatively delayed breakthrough made him something of a late bloomer, even in an era when stars weren't minted as quickly and early as they are now. It took him a while to figure out how to be himself on wax. It was his big homie Jaz-O who put him on, and the two of them had a Das EFX, Fu-Schnickens fast-rapping style that was as technically impressive as it was uninteresting. Instead it's the Jay we're a lot more familiar with: not just the hustler, but the boss. Aside from the rapping itself, a big part of why *Reasonable Doubt* resonates so much still is that it was what we would call today an exercise in personal branding.

recentArticles.title: 2010s pop star returns to Bay Area on first tour in 6 years - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # 2010s pop star returns to Bay Area on first tour in 6 years. A decade after “Location” launched him to stardom, Khalid is looking back on the song that changed his life. The Grammy-nominated Texas singer, whose full name is Khalid Donnel Robinson, broke through in the late 2010s with a string of introspective pop hits. Last summer, the singer gave local fans a first listen to his fourth studio album, “After the Sun Goes Down,” during an afternoon performance at San Francisco’s Golden Gate Park one day after its release. On Friday, June 26, Khalid returns to the Bay Area, this time across the Bay Bridge for a concert at the Greek Theatre in Berkeley as part of his It’s Always Summer Somewhere Tour — his first in six years. After going TikTok viral, this rising pop star is coming to S.F. One of Oakland’s largest festivals returns with Grammy-winning headliner. She joined the Chronicle as a summer 2023 intern for the Datebook team.
